hibernate-mapping.query: SELECT w.worklistID, MAX(acl.canCreate), MAX(acl.canComplete), MAX(acl.canDelete), MAX(acl.canReassign), MAX(acl.doEmailAlert) FROM com.mckesson.eig.workflow.worklist.api.Worklist AS w INNER JOIN w.acls AS acl WHERE acl.actor.actorID in (:ACTOR_IDS) GROUP BY w.worklistID

SELECT w.worklistID, MAX(acl.canCreate), MAX(acl.canComplete), MAX(acl.canDelete), MAX(acl.canReassign), MAX(acl.doEmailAlert) FROM com.mckesson.eig.workflow.worklist.api.Worklist AS w INNER JOIN w.acls AS acl WHERE acl.actor.actorID in (:ACTOR_IDS) AND w.worklistID=:WORKLIST_ID GROUP BY w.worklistID
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: DELETE FROM HECM_WLIST.WF_ACL_RESOLVED WHERE SESSION_ID =:SESSION_ID AND WORKLIST_ID IN (:WORKLIST_IDs)
hibernate-mapping.query: SELECT canCreate FROM com.mckesson.eig.workflow.worklist.api.TaskACLResolved WHERE sessionID=:SESSION_ID and worklistID=:WORKLIST_ID
SELECT acl FROM com.mckesson.eig.workflow.worklist.api.TaskACLResolved acl WHERE acl.sessionID=:SESSION_ID and acl.worklistID=:WORKLIST_ID
SELECT canReassign FROM com.mckesson.eig.workflow.worklist.api.TaskACLResolved WHERE sessionID=:SESSION_ID and worklistID=:WORKLIST_ID
SELECT canComplete FROM com.mckesson.eig.workflow.worklist.api.TaskACLResolved WHERE sessionID=:SESSION_ID and worklistID=:WORKLIST_ID
SELECT canDelete FROM com.mckesson.eig.workflow.worklist.api.TaskACLResolved WHERE sessionID=:SESSION_ID and worklistID=:WORKLIST_ID
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT WORKLIST_ID FROM HECM_WLIST.WF_ACL_RESOLVED WHERE SESSION_ID=:SESSION_ID and CREATE_FLAG='Y'
SELECT WORKLIST_ID FROM HECM_WLIST.WF_ACL_RESOLVED WHERE SESSION_ID=:SESSION_ID
hibernate-mapping.query: SELECT acl FROM com.mckesson.eig.workflow.worklist.api.TaskACLResolved acl WHERE acl.sessionID = ?
